compiled_state.title: Script Tests: relative ../ paths in end-session/fix-bug scripts -> test_no_relative_paths_in_plugin_scripts fails
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
CI 'Script Tests' job fails on test_no_relative_paths_in_plugin_scripts (8 violations) and test_fix_bug_references_prior_art (prior-art-search absent from Step 6 in fix-bug/SKILL.md).

Both failures are pre-existing on main branch (CI run 25031581809 shows Script Tests failing on main).

Violations:
- plugins/dso/scripts/fix-bug/blast-radius.sh:76-77: uses $SCRIPT_DIR/../read-config.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/fix-bug/dependency-check.sh:64-65: uses $SCRIPT_DIR/../read-config.sh  
- plugins/dso/scripts/end-session/check-orphan-epics.sh:62: uses $_SCRIPT_DIR/../ticket
- plugins/dso/scripts/end-session/error-sweep.sh:22,125: uses $_ERROR_SWEEP_SCRIPT_DIR/../ticket and $_SWEEP_DIR/../read-config.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/end-session/end-session-cleanup.sh:45: uses $(dirname BASH_SOURCE)/../..

Prior-art test: fix-bug/SKILL.md was refactored from Step N to Phase X structure; test_fix_bug_references_prior_art still looks for prior-art-search in 'Step 6' section which no longer exists.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC) — severity=medium (CI failure blocks PR merge), complexity=simple (clear pattern violations), environment=CI, deterministic
comments.author: Test
